name: The Fool
upright: A leap of faith into the unknown. New beginnings, unlimited potential, and the courage to start a journey without knowing the destination.
reversed: Recklessness, naivety, foolish risk-taking. Holding back from a necessary leap due to fear.

name: The Magician
upright: You have all the tools you need. Channel your willpower to manifest your desires. Skill and resourcefulness lead to success.
reversed: Manipulation, trickery, untapped potential. Misuse of talent or deception.

name: The High Priestess
upright: Trust your intuition. Hidden knowledge is revealing itself. Look beyond the surface and listen to your inner voice.
reversed: Secrets withheld, disconnection from intuition, superficial understanding.

name: The Empress
upright: Abundance flows to you through nurturing and creativity. A time of growth, comfort, and connection with the natural world.
reversed: Creative block, dependence, neglect of self-care or others.

name: The Emperor
upright: Establish order and structure. Authority exercised wisely brings stability. Take charge of your situation with discipline.
reversed: Rigidity, tyranny, lack of discipline, loss of control.

name: The Hierophant
upright: Seek wisdom through established traditions and mentors. Spiritual guidance is available if you are open to learning.
reversed: Challenging convention, unorthodox approaches, rejecting tradition.

name: The Lovers
upright: A deep connection or important choice. Alignment of values and desires. Union of complementary forces.
reversed: Disharmony, misalignment, difficult choices, broken trust.

name: The Chariot
upright: Victory through determination and willpower. Harness opposing forces and drive forward with confidence.
reversed: Lack of direction, aggression, obstacles overwhelming willpower.

name: Strength
upright: True strength comes from patience and compassion, not force. Tame your inner fears with gentle courage.
reversed: Self-doubt, weakness, raw emotion overwhelming reason.

name: The Hermit
upright: Withdraw from the noise and seek answers within. Solitude brings wisdom. Your inner light guides the way.
reversed: Isolation, loneliness, withdrawal from help, lost direction.

name: Wheel of Fortune
upright: The wheel turns — change is coming. A turning point in your journey. Embrace the cycles of fortune.
reversed: Bad luck, resistance to change, feeling stuck in a cycle.

name: Justice
upright: Truth and fairness prevail. Take responsibility for your actions. A balanced decision is required.
reversed: Injustice, dishonesty, lack of accountability, unfair treatment.

name: The Hanged Man
upright: Surrender control and see things from a new perspective. A willing pause that leads to enlightenment.
reversed: Stalling, resistance to necessary sacrifice, indecision.

name: Death
upright: A profound transformation. Something must end for something new to begin. Embrace the rebirth.
reversed: Resistance to change, stagnation, fear of letting go.

name: Temperance
upright: Find the middle path. Patience and moderation bring harmony. Blend opposing elements into something beautiful.
reversed: Imbalance, excess, impatience, lack of harmony.

name: The Devil
upright: Examine what binds you — addiction, materialism, toxic patterns. Awareness of your shadow self is the first step to freedom.
reversed: Breaking free, releasing attachments, reclaiming power.

name: The Tower
upright: Sudden upheaval shatters false structures. Though shocking, this destruction clears the way for truth and rebuilding.
reversed: Avoidance of disaster, fear of change, personal transformation.

name: The Star
upright: A guiding light appears after darkness. Hope, healing, and renewed faith. Trust that you are on the right path.
reversed: Despair, disconnection, lack of faith, lost inspiration.

name: The Moon
upright: Things are not as they seem. Navigate through uncertainty by trusting your instincts. Face your fears and illusions.
reversed: Release of fear, clarity emerging, overcoming confusion.

name: The Sun
upright: Radiant joy and success. Everything becomes clear under the sun. Vitality, warmth, and achievement.
reversed: Temporary sadness, lack of clarity, delayed success.

name: Judgement
upright: A calling to rise up and embrace your purpose. Reflect on your journey and answer the call to transformation.
reversed: Self-doubt, refusal to learn, harsh self-judgement.

name: The World
upright: A cycle reaches completion. Integration of all you have learned. Wholeness, accomplishment, and celebration.
reversed: Incomplete, shortcuts taken, lack of closure.

name: Ace of Wands
upright: Creative spark and inspired action.
reversed: Delays in new ventures, lack of direction.

name: Two of Wands
upright: Planning your future path with both options open.
reversed: Fear of the unknown, poor planning.

name: Three of Wands
upright: Expansion and looking ahead — your ships are coming in.
reversed: Setbacks in plans, lack of foresight.

name: Four of Wands
upright: Celebration, stability, and joyful homecoming.
reversed: Instability, transition, feeling unwelcome.

name: Five of Wands
upright: Petty conflict and competitive tension.
reversed: Avoiding conflict, inner tension.

name: Six of Wands
upright: Public recognition and victory after effort.
reversed: Failure, lack of recognition, self-doubt.

name: Seven of Wands
upright: Holding your ground despite opposition.
reversed: Giving up, overwhelmed, cannot keep fighting.

name: Eight of Wands
upright: Swift movement and rapid developments.
reversed: Delays, frustration, losing momentum.

name: Nine of Wands
upright: Standing firm through perseverance and endurance.
reversed: Paranoia, defensiveness, stubbornness.

name: Ten of Wands
upright: Carrying heavy burdens and responsibilities.
reversed: Burnout, taking on too much, inability to delegate.

name: Page of Wands
upright: An enthusiastic messenger bringing exciting news or opportunities.
reversed: Setbacks to plans, hasty actions, lack of direction.

name: Knight of Wands
upright: Passionate pursuit of a goal with fiery determination.
reversed: Recklessness, scattered energy, delays in travel.

name: Queen of Wands
upright: A warm, confident presence who inspires others with courage.
reversed: Jealousy, selfishness, demanding temperament.

name: King of Wands
upright: Bold leadership with a clear vision and natural charisma.
reversed: Impulsiveness, ruthlessness, unrealistic expectations.

name: Ace of Cups
upright: New emotional beginning, love offered or received.
reversed: Blocked emotions, love unrequited.

name: Two of Cups
upright: Deep connection and mutual attraction forming.
reversed: Imbalance in relationship, broken connection.

name: Three of Cups
upright: Celebration with friends, creative collaboration, joy.
reversed: Overindulgence, scattered creativity, isolation.

name: Four of Cups
upright: Turning inward, emotional apathy, missed opportunities.
reversed: Motivation returns, new opportunity noticed.

name: Five of Cups
upright: Grief and loss, but something remains — focus on what is left.
reversed: Acceptance, moving on, finding peace after loss.

name: Six of Cups
upright: Sweet nostalgia and happy memories, an old friend returns.
reversed: Living in the past, unrealistic expectations.

name: Seven of Cups
upright: So many dreams, but which is real? Choose carefully.
reversed: Confusion clears, grounding in reality.

name: Eight of Cups
upright: Walking away from what no longer serves you.
reversed: Fear of change, clinging to comfort.

name: Nine of Cups
upright: Wishes fulfilled, emotional and material satisfaction.
reversed: Smugness, materialism, dissatisfaction despite having enough.

name: Ten of Cups
upright: Loving family, deep emotional fulfillment, lasting happiness.
reversed: Family discord, broken home, misaligned values.

name: Page of Cups
upright: A sensitive soul bringing creative inspiration or emotional news.
reversed: Emotional immaturity, creative blocks, escapism.

name: Knight of Cups
upright: A romantic idealist following their heart toward new horizons.
reversed: Moodiness, unrealistic expectations, emotional manipulation.

name: Queen of Cups
upright: Deep emotional wisdom and compassion; nurturing intuition.
reversed: Codependency, emotional insecurity, martyrdom.

name: King of Cups
upright: Emotionally balanced leadership with generous wisdom.
reversed: Emotional manipulation, volatility, moodiness.

name: Ace of Swords
upright: A breakthrough of clarity and truth.
reversed: Confusion, miscommunication, mental fog.

name: Two of Swords
upright: Refusing to see or address a difficult situation.
reversed: Releasing denial, confronting truth.

name: Three of Swords
upright: Heartbreak and deep sorrow; a painful but necessary truth.
reversed: Recovery from heartbreak, releasing pain.

name: Four of Swords
upright: Rest and recovery — you need to step back and heal.
reversed: Restlessness, burnout from refusing rest.

name: Five of Swords
upright: Conflict and defeat, possibly through dishonor.
reversed: Learning from defeat, making amends.

name: Six of Swords
upright: A necessary transition; moving toward something better.
reversed: Resistance to change, unfinished business.

name: Seven of Swords
upright: Strategic action, possibly deception — check your motives.
reversed: Coming clean, being caught, confession.

name: Eight of Swords
upright: Feeling trapped and powerless, but the bonds are mental.
reversed: Finding a way out, self-empowerment.

name: Nine of Swords
upright: Overwhelming anxiety and worry keeping you up at night.
reversed: Recovery from anxiety, hope returning.

name: Ten of Swords
upright: A painful ending, but the worst is over.
reversed: Survival, rising from disaster, unable to let go.

name: Page of Swords
upright: A sharp mind eager to learn and communicate new ideas.
reversed: Gossip, deception, all talk and no action.

name: Knight of Swords
upright: Swift intellectual pursuit, charging ahead with determination.
reversed: Aggression, impatience, scattered thinking.

name: Queen of Swords
upright: Clear-sighted perception that cuts through deception.
reversed: Cruelty, cold-heartedness, bitterness.

name: King of Swords
upright: Intellectual authority wielded with ethical clarity.
reversed: Tyrannical thinking, abuse of power, manipulation.

name: Ace of Pentacles
upright: A new financial or material opportunity manifests.
reversed: Missed opportunity, poor financial planning.

name: Two of Pentacles
upright: Balancing multiple priorities with adaptability.
reversed: Overcommitted, financial disorganization.

name: Three of Pentacles
upright: Teamwork producing quality results; recognition of skill.
reversed: Mediocre work, lack of teamwork, shortcuts.

name: Four of Pentacles
upright: Holding tight to what you have; security through control.
reversed: Greed, financial insecurity despite having enough.

name: Five of Pentacles
upright: Financial hardship and feeling left out in the cold.
reversed: Recovery from financial setback, spiritual poverty.

name: Six of Pentacles
upright: Generous spirit, giving or receiving needed help.
reversed: Strings attached to generosity, debt.

name: Seven of Pentacles
upright: Patience as long-term investments take root.
reversed: Impatience, poor returns, frustration with slow progress.

name: Eight of Pentacles
upright: Dedicated mastery through disciplined practice.
reversed: Cutting corners, lack of ambition, dead-end work.

name: Nine of Pentacles
upright: Self-sufficient abundance and well-earned independence.
reversed: Over-investment in material life, financial setbacks.

name: Ten of Pentacles
upright: Lasting legacy, family wealth, and material fulfillment.
reversed: Family disputes over money, failure to plan legacy.

name: Page of Pentacles
upright: A diligent student manifesting new practical opportunities.
reversed: Lack of focus, procrastination, missed opportunities.

name: Knight of Pentacles
upright: Steady, reliable progress through patient hard work.
reversed: Laziness, boredom, stagnation, perfectionism.

name: Queen of Pentacles
upright: Practical generosity and nurturing abundance in daily life.
reversed: Neglect of finances, smothering, work-life imbalance.

name: King of Pentacles
upright: Material mastery and disciplined abundance; a provider.
reversed: Greed, materialism, stubbornness, poor financial management.
